filesystem.description: Scoped local file access for the Weftlyflow repo.

github.description: Official hosted GitHub MCP — issues, PRs, repos.

context7.description: Live docs lookup — FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Vue, Vue Flow, Celery, RestrictedPython, LangChain.

playwright.description: Headless browser — E2E testing of the editor canvas and docs site.

postgres.description: Read-only access to Weftlyflow's Postgres (use when docker-compose is up).

redis.description: Inspect Celery queues, leader-election locks, webhook cache.

weftlyflow-tools.description: In-repo Weftlyflow MCP server — expose node catalog, workflow CRUD, trigger tests as MCP tools. Implement in src/weftlyflow/mcp/__main__.py.

_guidance.costControl: Each connected server adds to context. Disable unused ones.
_guidance.security: Never hardcode tokens. Use ${VAR}; set in shell env or settings.local.json.env.
